summary: Frontend testing completed for DentalHub doctor profile features. All requested features are working correctly including header bar, profile dropdown, account page, logout, and navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All profile features tested and working. Login with doctor@dentalapp.com / doctor123. Profile dropdown has data-testid='profile-menu-trigger', account page has data-testid='account-page'.

desktop: Top header bar shows doctor name (Dr. Sarah Johnson) and avatar - PASS
Profile dropdown opens on click - PASS
Dropdown shows doctor name, email, My Account, Settings, Log out - PASS
Clicking My Account navigates to /account - PASS
Account page displays all doctor details (name, email, phone, country, registration number, college, specialization) - PASS
Clicking Log out clears session and redirects to /login - PASS
Sidebar navigation works (Dashboard, Patients, Analytics, Clinics) - PASS
mobile: DentalHub branding visible on mobile header - PASS
Doctor name hidden on mobile (only avatar SJ visible) - PASS
Profile dropdown works on mobile - PASS
Bottom mobile navigation works (Cases, Patients, Timeline, Search) - PASS
